input.prompt:
I have a CouponService that uses DateTime.UtcNow in several places. TimeProvider
is already registered in my DI container. Can you replace all the DateTime.UtcNow
calls with TimeProvider and add the constructor parameter?

data.content:

is already registered in my DI container. Can you replace all the DateTime.UtcNow
calls with TimeProvider and add the constructor parameter?
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-11T01:10:47.777Z</current_datetime>

I have a CouponService that uses DateTime.UtcNow in several places. TimeProvider

input.initialPrompt:
I have a CouponService that uses DateTime.UtcNow in several places. TimeProvider
is already registered in my DI container. Can you replace all the DateTime.UtcNow
calls with TimeProvider and add the constructor parameter?

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to find and modify a CouponService file that uses DateTime.UtcNow, replacing those calls with TimeProvider. Let me explore the workspace to find this file.

toolCalls.name: edit

data.content: Now replace all four `DateTime.UtcNow` usages with `_timeProvider.GetUtcNow()`:

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args: {"old_str": "            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,\n            ExpiresAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(validDays)", "new_str": "            CreatedAt = _timeProvider.GetUtcNow().UtcDateTime,\n            ExpiresAt = _timeProvider.GetUtcNow().AddDays(validDays).UtcDateTime", "path": "/tmp/sv-36b089db77a04823af94212fa377d51d/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs"}

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args: {"old_str": "        var remaining = coupon.ExpiresAt - DateTime.UtcNow;", "new_str": "        var remaining = coupon.ExpiresAt - _timeProvider.GetUtcNow().UtcDateTime;", "path": "/tmp/sv-36b089db77a04823af94212fa377d51d/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs"}

toolResult.sessionLog:
diff --git a/tmp/sv-36b089db77a04823af94212fa377d51d/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs b/tmp/sv-36b089db77a04823af94212fa377d51d/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs
index 0000000..0000000 100644
--- a/tmp/sv-36b089db77a04823af94212fa377d51d/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs
+++ b/tmp/sv-36b089db77a04823af94212fa377d51d/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs
@@ -16,8 +16,8 @@
         return new Coupon
         {
             Code = code,
-            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
-            ExpiresAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(validDays)
+            CreatedAt = _timeProvider.GetUtcNow().UtcDateTime,
+            ExpiresAt = _timeProvider.GetUtcNow().AddDays(validDays).UtcDateTime
         };
     }

result.detailedContent:
diff --git a/tmp/sv-36b089db77a04823af94212fa377d51d/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs b/tmp/sv-36b089db77a04823af94212fa377d51d/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs
index 0000000..0000000 100644
--- a/tmp/sv-36b089db77a04823af94212fa377d51d/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs
+++ b/tmp/sv-36b089db77a04823af94212fa377d51d/fixtures/ready-to-migrate/Services/CouponService.cs
@@ -16,8 +16,8 @@
         return new Coupon
         {
             Code = code,
-            CreatedAt = DateTime.UtcNow,
-            ExpiresAt = DateTime.UtcNow.AddDays(validDays)
+            CreatedAt = _timeProvider.GetUtcNow().UtcDateTime,
+            ExpiresAt = _timeProvider.GetUtcNow().AddDays(validDays).UtcDateTime
         };
     }

data.content:
Done. Here's what changed:

- **Constructor**: Added `TimeProvider timeProvider` parameter and `_timeProvider` field.
- **All 4 `DateTime.UtcNow` calls** replaced with `_timeProvider.GetUtcNow().UtcDateTime` — the `.UtcDateTime` conversion keeps compatibility with the existing `DateTime`-typed properties on `Coupon`.

Since `TimeProvider` is already in your DI container, it will be injected automatically.
